texto: The world may not care about you! Cope with this fact! Stand strong like a rock! Keep walking
autor: the road to happiness will mysteriously appear before you!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a the road to happiness will mysteriously appear before you!: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “The world may not care about you! Cope with this fact! Stand strong like a rock! Keep walking” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, mehmet-murat-ildan, world pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
